subcodes.first_line: O noble and kind father and son! Your letter was received and the utmost joy was derived from its perusal, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پدر و پسر بزرگوار مهربان نامه شما رسید و از قرائتش نهایت بهجت حاصل شد زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @growth of the Cause
